---
title: "Dividing the Atom Primordially"
---

::: heart-container

# Choose Your Path

```{=html}
<svg class="heart-svg" viewBox="0 0 600 600" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <!-- Heart outline -->
  <path d="M300 520 C 100 380, 50 250, 120 160 C 170 100, 250 100, 300 180 C 350 100, 430 100, 480 160 C 550 250, 500 380, 300 520 Z"
        fill="none" stroke="#ff6b9d" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.6"/>

  <!-- Labyrinth decorative paths -->
  <path d="M300 480 C 140 360, 100 260, 150 190 C 190 150, 250 160, 300 230" fill="none" stroke="#3a3a5a" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5"/>
  <path d="M300 480 C 460 360, 500 260, 450 190 C 410 150, 350 160, 300 230" fill="none" stroke="#3a3a5a" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5"/>
  <path d="M300 440 C 180 340, 150 270, 180 220 C 210 190, 260 200, 300 260" fill="none" stroke="#2a2a4a" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/>
  <path d="M300 440 C 420 340, 450 270, 420 220 C 390 190, 340 200, 300 260" fill="none" stroke="#2a2a4a" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/>
  <path d="M300 400 C 220 330, 200 290, 210 260 C 230 240, 270 250, 300 290" fill="none" stroke="#1a1a3a" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/>
  <path d="M300 400 C 380 330, 400 290, 390 260 C 370 240, 330 250, 300 290" fill="none" stroke="#1a1a3a" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/>

  <!-- Clue 1 - Top left zone -->
  <a href="./clue-1/">
    <circle class="clue-zone" cx="200" cy="200" r="45"/>
    <text class="clue-label" x="200" y="205">Clue 1</text>
  </a>

  <!-- Clue 2 - Top right zone -->
  <a href="./clue-2/">
    <circle class="clue-zone" cx="400" cy="200" r="45"/>
    <text class="clue-label" x="400" y="205">Clue 2</text>
  </a>

  <!-- Clue 3 - Bottom left zone -->
  <a href="./clue-3/">
    <circle class="clue-zone" cx="180" cy="340" r="45"/>
    <text class="clue-label" x="180" y="345">Clue 3</text>
  </a>

  <!-- Clue 4 - Bottom right zone -->
  <a href="./clue-4/">
    <circle class="clue-zone" cx="420" cy="340" r="45"/>
    <text class="clue-label" x="420" y="345">Clue 4</text>
  </a>

  <!-- Center start link -->
  <a href="./inicio/">
    <circle class="clue-zone" cx="300" cy="290" r="35" style="fill: rgba(126,200,227,0.15); stroke: rgba(126,200,227,0.3);"/>
    <text class="clue-label" x="300" y="295" style="fill: #7ec8e3;">Start</text>
  </a>
</svg>
```

:::
